description: Autonomous AI hiring and sourcing platform (tallyhq.com redirects to trycandid.com) that learns a company's hiring bar, engages candidates via personalized email and LinkedIn outreach, and delivers meeting-ready talent.
unique_value: Learns your actual hiring bar from real decisions, not job descriptions, and runs autonomous outreach to deliver pre-qualified, meeting-ready candidates.
product_description: AI recruiting platform that sources, engages, and qualifies candidates autonomously based on actual hiring bar data.
how_it_works: Learns company's hiring bar from past decisions. Searches LinkedIn and other databases. Sends personalized outreach at scale. Qualifies candidates via AI screening. Delivers only meeting-ready candidates to hiring teams.
target_customer: Tech startups and mid-size companies looking to scale recruiting without adding headcount.
business_model: Unknown (likely SaaS subscription or per-hire fee).
key_differentiator: Learns actual hiring bar, not just job descriptions; fully autonomous from sourcing to meeting-scheduling.
